task: create PLAN.md for opslabs project lifecycle planning
observations: The project has moved beyond the original Week 1 mock/Docker MVP plan.
The current codebase includes Go Kratos backend, React/Vite frontend, Docker runtime, Redis-backed attempt store, GC/stale-container cleanup, and multiple execution modes.
The registry currently defines seven scenarios, but only hello-world appears as a fully materialized Docker scenario under scenarios/ by default.
The next planning document should focus on productization, content production, launch readiness, compliance, and one-person company operations.
constraints: Keep project facts aligned with repository state.
